---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
date: YYYY-MM-DD
categories: ["AI in Practice"]
image: hero.png
image-alt: ""
description: ""
toc: false
draft: true
---

![](hero.png){.preview-image fig-align="center"}

Lead paragraph that opens with the sharpest claim. One concrete observation, one specific data point, or one named tool. No throat-clearing.

## Body section

Two to four short paragraphs. One figure, table, or pull-quote if useful.

## Take

One-sentence takeaway. The reader should walk away able to repeat this in a hallway conversation.
